headline: SpaceX IPO Valuation Is Worth More Than Boeing, RTX, GE Aerospace And Every Other S&P 500 Aerospace Firm Combined: Report
summary: The upcoming SpaceX IPO is touted to be the biggest public offering since Aramco in 2019. However, the more than $1.7 trillion valuation puts it further ahead than some of the biggest companies on the S&P 500 index, operated by...

headline: WCG Appoints Anthony Doyle as Chief Financial Officer to Support Continued Growth and Operational Scale
summary: WCG, a global leader in providing solutions that measurably improve and accelerate clinical research, today announced the appointment of Anthony Doyle as chief financial officer, effective June 15, 2026. Anthony succeeds Robert VanHees, who will remain with the company until December 31, 2026 as a special advisor to ensure a smooth transition.

headline: Honeywell Stock Offers 2 Ways to Win
summary: Honeywell International  circa 2026 can be like General Electric circa 2024.  Things might not go quite that well for Honeywell, but the spinoff is from the same playbook.  Honeywell will create two companies, one dedicated to aerospace and the other to automation.

headline: Old Dominion Freight Line, GE Vernova, and Caterpillar Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after the CPI report showed 4.2% annual inflation, the highest in three years, with markets fully pricing a December Fed rate hike.
